posts.text:
Liberal women: "Far right Republicans are going to turn America into the Handmaid's Tale!"

Also liberal women:




Governor Mikie Sherrill (@GovSherrillNJ)

Celebrating the end of Ramadan this morning in Newark.

Assalamu Alaikum and Eid Mubarak, New Jersey!











— https://nitter.net/GovSherrillNJ/status/2035053315977855068#m

WATCH: Democrat activists scream about the “wind” as they try to shield NJ-07 Democrat candidate @Varela4NJ from answering questions about voter ID:

Q: “Mr. Varela, why don’t you support voter ID?”

Dem Staffer: “It’s really, really windy out here… You should go home because it’s really windy and really cold too.”

Video

If you want to see something incredibly cringe, just watch this video of Abigail Spanberger attempting to relate to the common folk by talking about March Madness.

Video

I'll always remember Chuck Norris as the man who changed the course of dodgeball history by casting the deciding vote that allowed Average Joes to play in the championship of the Las Vegas International Dodgeball Open where they upset the heavily favored Globo Gym Purple Cobras.

RIP. 🙏

Video

Chuck Norris didn't die.

He told death he was coming.


TMZ (@TMZ)

🕊️ Chuck Norris has died at 86. tmz.me/N3EVxQe





— https://nitter.net/TMZ/status/2034992045165879785#m

Picked High Point and VCU to win award 🥇

(my family does the bracket pool on excel haha).
Charlie Kirk was killed in an act of left-wing domestic terroris.
The left hated Charlie Kirk because he told them the truth.
Donald J. Trump is your President. 🇺🇸
A moment I will never forget. #fyp #trump2024 #maga
Hi. I’m back. Me and my friend Garrett here were the guys behind @Team Trump the whole time. #fyp #trump2024 #maga

Ukraine is not winning the war with Russia yet Congress wants to give them billions more American tax dollars to keep fighting at a stalemate. #greenscreen #fyp #foryoupage #ukraine #russia #zelensky #biden #antiwar #conservative #republican #politics #trump #trump2024 #maga #redpilltiktok

Less than a week after The Fall of Minneapolis was released, Derek Chauvin was stabbed in prison by a former FBI informant. #greenscreen #fyp #foryoupage #minneapolis #georgefloyd #derekchauvin #thefallofminneapolis #conservative #republican #politics #trump #trump2024 #maga #redpilltiktok
